raw_cv_text:
Alexa Petrovskaya
+44 7911 234567 | Email: alexa.petrovskaya@gmail.com | LinkedIn: alexa-petrovskaya | GitHub: AlexaPetrovskaya |
https://alexa.dev
EDUCATION
Imperial College London | BSc Computing (2nd Year) 2022 - Present
Achieved 78% in Year 1 (equivalent to 1st class honors track); ranked top 12% in Algorithms & Data
Structures module with 89%
Led peer study group of 18 students in discrete mathematics, improving cohort average from 71% to
76% over 1 semester
University of Amsterdam | Exchange Year - Computer Science 2023 - 2024
Completed advanced systems programming course with distinction (9.2/10); built a kernel module
achieving 12% faster I/O throughput
Participated in ACM ICPC qualifying round, solving 4/10 problems and ranking 47th among 250+
teams from Benelux region
EXPERIENCE
Stripe | Software Engineering Intern Summer 2023 (3 months)
Optimized payment processing pipeline by refactoring legacy fraud detection service; reduced
average latency from 287ms to 156ms (46% improvement) affecting 850K+ daily transactions
Implemented distributed caching layer for card validation using Redis; improved throughput from
4.2K to 18.5K requests/sec (340% gain) and reduced database load by 67%
Shipped 8 pull requests merged by senior engineers; wrote comprehensive unit tests achieving 94%
code coverage and prevented 3 critical race conditions before production deployment
Figma | Frontend Engineering Intern Summer 2024 (3.5 months)
Built real-time collaboration feature for shape drawing; optimized WebSocket message batching
reduced network payload by 73% and improved sync latency from 420ms to 89ms for 12K+
concurrent users
Refactored canvas rendering pipeline to use WebGL instead of Canvas2D; achieved 3.8x faster frame
rendering (from 24fps to 91fps) on 4K viewport with 50K+ elements
Conducted accessibility audit fixing 27 WCAG 2.1 AA violations; implemented keyboard navigation
improving keyboard-only user coverage from 41% to 94% across design editor
Wise (formerly TransferWise) | Full-Stack Engineering Intern Winter 2024 (2 months)
Developed internal analytics dashboard using React + TypeScript + GraphQL; reduced report
generation time from 6.2 seconds to 0.8 seconds (7.75x speedup) for 500K+ transaction queries
Migrated legacy payment gateway integration from REST to gRPC protocol; achieved 42% reduction
in latency (340ms → 197ms) and 58% lower bandwidth consumption across 200+ daily payment
routes
Fixed 12 production bugs identified through monitoring alerts; reduced API error rate for money
transfer endpoints from 0.34% to 0.07% and saved $47K in failed transaction refunds
PROJECTS
QueryVault | Rust, PostgreSQL, Tokio, Protocol Buffers 2023 - Present
Built high-performance distributed query cache middleware; 2,400+ GitHub stars, benchmarks show
8.9x latency reduction for repeated queries (from 340ms to 38ms) and handles 45K QPS at p99<50ms
Implemented consensus protocol for cache invalidation across 7-node cluster achieving <200ms
consistency window; 2.3K+ releases on crates.io with 89K+ monthly downloads
PixelForge | TypeScript, Canvas API, Vite, Jest 2023 - 2024
Open-source pixel art editor with collaborative features; reached 1,680+ GitHub stars in 8 months,
890+ active monthly users, and featured in ProductHunt #3 trending
Optimized rendering performance from 15fps to 60fps+ on large canvases (8K×8K pixels) through
WebWorker architecture; reduced initial bundle size from 2.4MB to 380KB via tree-shaking
SyntaxShield | Python, LLVM, AST parsing, pytest 2024
Static analysis linter for Python detecting 34 categories of code smells and security issues; 476
GitHub stars with 12K+ PyPI downloads since launch 2 months ago
Achieves sub-second analysis on projects up to 100K lines of code; correctly identifies 97.2% of
intentional vulnerabilities in test suite and integrates with 8+ popular IDEs
EXTRACURRICULAR
PyCon Europe 2024 | Conference Speaker - 'Performance Engineering for Young Developers' 2024
Delivered 45-minute technical talk to 280+ attendees covering profiling techniques and optimization
case studies; talk received 4.8/5 average rating (146 evaluations) and was selected as top 5 talks
Published accompanying blog post that reached 15K+ views; created open-source profiling toolkit
demonstrated in talk with 340+ GitHub stars
Coding Mentorship Initiative (Imperial + Amsterdam) | Senior Mentor - Backend 2023 -
Systems & Databases Present
Mentored 8 junior students (first-year undergrads) through capstone projects; 87.5% mentees
achieved 1st class marks (up from 62% cohort average) and 6/8 secured internships at tier-1 tech
companies
Conducted weekly 1-hour sessions covering system design, database optimization, and Rust
fundamentals; created 14-module curriculum used by 140+ students across both universities
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – Python, TypeScript, Rust, JavaScript, SQL, Java, Go
Technologies – React, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka, gRPC, GraphQL, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS (EC2,
RDS, S3), Git
Tools – VS Code, Git, GitHub, Figma, Datadog, Jira, Docker, Linux, Postman, Chrome DevTools
name: Email

extracurricular.subtitle: Conference Speaker - 'Performance Engineering for Young Developers'
